slices.title: Glyph rendering quality at small cell sizes
passes: visual: characters are legible at cellSize=8
slices.notes: Glyph atlas at 48px + per-cell stamp canvas with source-in tinting; threshold fontSize<14

slices.title: Background blur consistency
slices.notes: Oversized draw area (3× blur radius padding) eliminates dark-edge fringe from blur kernel sampling outside canvas bounds
